steps.title: Identify initial value and rate
steps.content: At birth ($x=0$ days), the calf weighs 226 pounds, so the starting value is 226. It gains an average of 3 pounds per day, so the rate of change is $+3$ per day.

steps.title: Write the linear model
steps.content: A linear model has the form $y=(\text{initial})+(\text{rate})x$. Substituting gives $$y=226+3x.$$

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content:
• $y=226+3x$: starts at 226 and grows by 3 each day — matches.
  • $y=226-3x$: would mean losing 3 pounds per day — contradicts gaining weight.
  • $y=3+226x$: starts at 3 pounds, not 226 — wrong starting weight.
  • $y=3-226x$: starts at 3 and decreases sharply — both starting value and direction wrong.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
